zh.Abbey of Saint-Martial, Limoges, Departe: 法國利姆辛豪-維安利莫格斯
zh.Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitain: 法國努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安利莫格斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Vicomte Guy VI de Limoges於1197年出生在法國努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安利莫格斯時，他的父親Guy III de Limoges41歲，母親Ermengarde de Barry22歲。他和Marguerite de Bourgogne至少有2個女兒。他去世於1263年8月在法國阿奎泰道多布朗o享年66歲，埋葬在法國利姆辛豪-維安利莫格斯。

zh-hans.Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitain: 法国努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安利莫格斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Vicomte Guy VI de Limoges于1197年出生在法国努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安利莫格斯时，他的父亲Guy III de Limoges41岁，母亲Ermengarde de Barry22岁。他和Marguerite de Bourgogne至少有2个女儿。他去世于1263年8月在法国阿奎泰道多布朗o享年66岁，埋葬在法国利姆辛豪-維安利莫格斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Limoges
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Emile, Fernand, Gaston, Jacques, Monique, Muguette, Pierre, Rosaire.
French: habitational name from the city of Limoges and of several other places in the southwestern part of France.
History: Pierre Amand dit Jolicoeur and Limoges from Bordeaux in Gironde, France, married Catherine Grenier in Montreal, QC, in 1698.

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

nameMeanings.name: VI
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Vicomte Guy VI de Limoges was born in 1197, in Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, his father, Guy III de Limoges, was 41 and his mother, Ermengarde de Barry, was 22. He had at least 2 daughters with Marguerite de Bourgogne. He died in August 1263, in Brantôme, Dordogne, Aquitaine, France, at the age of 66, and was buried in Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Vicomte Guy VI de Limoges est né en 1197, à Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, son père, Guy III de Limoges, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Ermengarde de Barry, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 filles avec Marguerite de Bourgogne. Il est décédé en août 1263, à Brantôme, Dordogne, Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Vicomte Guy VI de Limoges 1197 in Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guy III de Limoges 41 und seine Mutter Ermengarde de Barry 22. Er hatte mit Marguerite de Bourgogne mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb im August 1263 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Brantôme, Dordogne, Aquitaine, Frankreich und wurde in Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Vicomte Guy VI de Limoges è nato il nel 1197 nel Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, il suo padre, Guy III de Limoges, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Ermengarde de Barry, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figlie con Marguerite de Bourgogne. Morì nel agosto 1263, nel Brantôme, Dordogne, Aquitaine, Francia, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, Francia.

ja.Brantôme, Dordogne, Aquitaine, France: フランスアクイティアインドールドグンブラントoメ
ja.Abbey of Saint-Martial, Limoges, Departe: フランスリモウシンハウテ-ヴィエンリモジェズ
ja.Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitain: フランスノウベレ-アクイティアインハウテ-ヴィエンリモジェズ
ja.lifeSummary: Vicomte Guy VI de Limogesが1197年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインハウテ-ヴィエンリモジェズで生まれた時，父Guy III de Limogesは41歳，母Ermengarde de Barryは22歳であった。彼はMarguerite de Bourgogneとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1263年8月にフランスアクイティアインドールドグンブラントoメで66歳で死去し，フランスリモウシンハウテ-ヴィエンリモジェズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Vicomte Guy VI de Limoges(이)가 1197년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 하테-비니 리모그스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guy III de Limoges(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Ermengarde de Barry(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Marguerite de Bourgogne(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1263년 8월 프랑스 아키테인 도르도그니 브랜트o에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 리모우신 하테-비니 리모그스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Vicomte Guy VI de Limoges nasceu em 1197, em Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, seu pai, Guy III de Limoges, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Ermengarde de Barry, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhas com Marguerite de Bourgogne. Ele faleceu em agosto de 1263, em Brantôme, Dordogne, Aquitaine, França, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Vicomte Guy VI de Limoges родился в 1197 г. в местности лимогесь, хауте-виенн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция, его отцу по имени Guy III de Limoges было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Ermengarde de Barry, 22. У него было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Marguerite de Bourgogne. Он умер август 1263 г. в местности брантoм, дордогн, аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности лимогесь, хауте-виенн, лимусин, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Vicomte Guy VI de Limoges nació en 1197, en Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, su papá, Guy III de Limoges, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Ermengarde de Barry, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijas con Marguerite de Bourgogne. Murió en agosto de 1263, en Brantôme, Dordogne, Aquitaine, Francia, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, Francia.
